core_payload.content:
# Symphony Run Attempt

## 1. Dream Direction
The Dream branch imagines each Symphony attempt as a richer assignment-bearing object rather than only a runtime wrapper around one coding pass.

## 2. Desired Future State
- clearer assignment handles and return paths for work started asynchronously.
- stronger artifact bundles that package review requests, follow-up work, and promotion candidates.
- better linkage between attempt outcome, branch discipline, and downstream control surfaces.
- clearer distinction between a durable attempt record and the live session nested inside it.

## 3. Why It Matters
Dream preserves the idea that repository work should remain attributable and reviewable even when it becomes more autonomous. A good run attempt is not only execution; it is execution plus accountability.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Symphony Run Attempt in the Dream branch preserves a richer assignment-bearing execution record. It imagines stronger return-path attribution, clearer artifact bundles, cleaner linkage between attempt outcome and branch discipline, and a more explicit distinction between a durable attempt record and the live session nested inside it. The capsule matters because autonomous repository work should remain reviewable and accountable even as it becomes more persistent, more asynchronous, and more tightly coupled to downstream review and promotion surfaces.
